items.q: What is the capital of Chile?
items.explanation: Santiago is the capital of Chile.

items.q: Name the capital city of Ireland.
items.explanation: The capital of Ireland is Dublin.

items.q: Which Australian island state lies south of the mainland?
items.explanation: This is a common Australian general knowledge fact.

items.q: New Delhi is the capital of India.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.

items.q: Which city hosts the Australian Open tennis Grand Slam?
items.explanation: This is a common Australian general knowledge fact.

items.q: Name the capital city of Argentina.
items.explanation: The capital of Argentina is Buenos Aires.

items.q: Brasilia is the capital of Brazil.
items.explanation: This is standard world geography knowledge.

items.q: What do the initials GDP stand for?
items.explanation: GDP is a broad economic output measure.

items.q: What is the freezing point of water in Celsius?
items.explanation: Pure water freezes at 0C at standard pressure.

items.q: Name the capital city of Canada.
items.explanation: The capital of Canada is Ottawa.
